commit_message:
[dv,pwrmgr] fixing nightly failures [dv,pwrmgr] fixing nightly failures - this fixes  `Offending '(esc_timeout || (!rst_lc_ni))' `signature in [nightly runs ](https://nightly.reports.lowrisc.org/opentitan_nightly_earlgrey/2025_10_07/hw/top_earlgrey/ip_autogen/pwrmgr/dv/report.html)of pwrmgr block seen for months now.
- clk_esc_i and clk_i are async to each other so proper fix is to model heart beat of clk_esc_i and also a counter that keeps track of clk_esc_i being dead for 138 cycles of clk_i
